column2: This is...the forest outside the duchy?
I believe this is actually the stretch of wood between the manor and the convent.
We're not going to talk about how we walked down some stairs in the middle of a pool
and ended up in the middle of the woods? As though--
Sister Magda, do you recognize where we are?
The north woods, maybe? I don't venture out often.
Interesting. Well, if anything comes to mind, please let us know. I hope your acquaintance
with this area can be of help to us.
Let's go. Now. Something's wrong here.
These are the woods outside the convent!
Oh no. Oh no, oh no, oh no. We have to go, now!
